title: Verify Tick Creation and Narrative Updating
objective: Validates that a Game Master can create new Ticks on the timeline and modify the narrative description of existing Ticks.

steps.step: As a logged-in GM, navigate to a campaign's timeline view.
steps.expected_result: The campaign timeline with existing Ticks is displayed.
A new Tick appears at the end of the timeline sequence, and an input field for its narrative is shown.

steps.step: Enter 'This is a new tick narrative.' into the new Tick's narrative field and save.
steps.expected_result: The narrative is saved successfully. Reloading the page should show the new Tick and its narrative.

steps.step: Select a pre-existing Tick on the timeline.
steps.expected_result: The narrative description field for that Tick becomes editable.

steps.step: Modify the narrative text of the selected Tick to 'This is an updated narrative.' and save.
steps.expected_result: The updated narrative is saved successfully. Reloading the page should show the modified narrative for that Tick.
